name: vn-cao-lau
input: a bowl of cao lầu with char siu pork, crispy noodles, and bean sprouts from Hội An
notes: Central VN regional dish (Hội An). Thicker cao lầu noodles (lye-water treated) + char siu pork + crispy fried noodle topping. USDA pork loin + thick rice noodle composite. Advisory tier — niche regional dish with limited ground-truth references.
